compiled_state.title: Explore agents and post-epic validation missed 6 v2 references and mis-classified deleted tk-sync-lib.sh as active v3 library
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Context
During epic 5d90-b43c (Remove All V2 Ticket System References), the sprint sub-agents responsible for finding and removing v2 references missed 6 stale references across README.md, examples/CLAUDE.md.example, CLAUDE.md, issue-batch.sh, and reviewer prompts. Additionally, the post-epic Explore agent mis-classified the deleted tk-sync-lib.sh as an active v3 library rather than verifying the file existed on disk first.

## Root Cause
1. Sub-agents scoped their search too narrowly — focused on the files listed in their ticket descriptions and didn't sweep README.md, examples/, or auto-generated agent files
2. The Explore agent trusted a filename reference in CLAUDE.md as evidence of the file's existence without running a file-existence check (ls/test -f)

## Improvement Needed
The codebase exploration process needs:
- A file-existence verification step when classifying references (does the referenced file actually exist?)
- Broader search scope for removal epics — sweep ALL files, not just those listed in the ticket
- Post-epic grep sweep as a formal validation step (not just running existing tests)

## Missed References
1. plugins/dso/scripts/issue-batch.sh:244 — tk_show() function name
2. README.md:24 — tk as required external dependency
3. README.md:43 — tk wrappers description
4. examples/CLAUDE.md.example:40-41 — tk ready/tk show commands
5. examples/CLAUDE.md.example:68 — tk close command
6. CLAUDE.md:60,67 — tk-sync-lib.sh references (deleted file)
7. plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-deep-arch.md:140 — tk-sync-lib.sh reference
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation: All 6 stale v2 references identified in the bug report have been removed: no matches for tk_show in issue-batch.sh, no 'tk ' in README.md or examples/CLAUDE.md.example, no tk-sync-lib in CLAUDE.md or reviewer-delta-deep-arch.md. Bug was resolved in prior commits.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
